rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in visible AADL features or declared equations.
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
Place implementation-level assignments in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
Avoid referencing AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly declared.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax within annex agree blocks.
Conditional logic in AGREE uses nested if-then-else expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit declarations.
